description.zh-Hans: 单独调整图像的色相、饱和度和明度（HSL）。将RGB转换为HSL，应用调整后再转换回RGB。
description.en: Adjusts hue, saturation, and lightness (HSL) of an image independently. Converts RGB -> HSL, applies adjustments, then converts back to RGB.

triggers.zh-Hans: HSL调整, 色相调整, 饱和度调整, 明度调整, 色调调整
triggers.en: hsl adjust, hue shift, saturation, lightness, color balance

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 调整精灵的色相、饱和度和明度以匹配新的配色方案。
exampleUsage.en: Adjust hue, saturation, and lightness of a sprite to match a new color scheme.
